title: Schlatt Simple Pack
description: A custom made texture pack made for pvp, similar to TheobaldTheBird's Bare Bones.
body:
actual good pack for once

similar to barebones or sharpness' 500k pack, made for mostly cart pvp but looks good for all other gamemodes

mostly custom made, took a few things from other packs, but all textures besides the gui are custom made
